SessionStart.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$msg = '📌 **Serena Project Activation Reminder**' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'At the start of each session, activate this project with Serena using the `activate_project` tool to enable semantic code analysis and project memory indexing.' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'Run: `serena project index` to index the project.' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'This enables: code navigation, symbol search, cross-reference resolution, and project-aware assistance.'; $o = New-Object PSObject -Property @{ systemMessage = $msg }; Write-Host ($o | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)"
SessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$msg = '📌 **Serena Project Activation Reminder**' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'At the start of each session, activate this project with Serena using the `activate_project` tool to enable semantic code analysis and project memory indexing.' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'Run: `serena project index` to index the project.' + [char]10 + [char]10 + 'This enables: code navigation, symbol search, cross-reference resolution, and project-aware assistance.'; $o = New-Object PSObject -Property @{ systemMessage = $msg }; Write-Host ($o | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)"
